human_verification.notes: Reviewed Issue #1155 requirements for fund-accounting-specific evidence handling, scenario completeness, valuation and tax boundaries, and validated packaging consistency.

review_notes: All required abilities across shared, revenue-billing-and-financial-reconciliation, and cross-industry sets are declared and validated.

Scenario coverage includes missing structure facts, unsupported overrides, stale-price escalation, reconciliation mismatches, adjacent-lane routing, overgeneralization guardrails, and tenant adaptation.
Package remains specification-based and documents a separate promotion path for any future retained-implementation runtime.

specialist_owned_evidence: Outputs are bounded to evidence-backed fund-accounting readiness, posting support, reconciliation, and escalation handling rather than final valuation, tax, or controller authority.
Source set includes SEC rules and DTCC mutual-fund workflow references with explicit refresh and decay posture.
Boundary logic explicitly prevents unsupported price overrides, fabricated accruals, and generic treatment of materially different fund structures.
notes: No blocking unresolved ambiguity remains; non-blocking ambiguity is recorded as tenant and vehicle-specific prerequisites for alternative fund structures and servicing models.
Runtime remains specification-based; retained-implementation promotion requires separate governance approval, telemetry evidence, and non-regression validation.
